original: This customized Reaper Armaments LP-17 is a sleek, trimmed down version of the civilian-bought model. This particular version is stacked with an extended magazine, heat sink and a top-mounted holographic sight keyed to a half-trigger pull: in effect, making the weapon highly accurate and rapid-firing. A perfect solution for boarding parties and close quarters entanglements, packing the power and accuracy of a carbine while leaving one hand free to wield a melee weapon.
